name: Koala
description: Koala — Product Analytics tool for developers. Specializes in visitor intelligence.

seo.title: Koala Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Koala analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Product Analytics.

review.verdict: Koala is a Product Analytics tool.
pros: Deep funnel and cohort analysis for product decisions
cons: Steeper learning curve for non-technical stakeholders
review.best_for: Product teams tracking user behavior and retention
review.not_for: Marketing-only analytics or pure content sites

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
